title: phaseolus vulgaris var. aureolus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. aureolus, also known as the golden kidney bean, is a variety of the common garden bean that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. aureolus are attributed to its ability to reduce blood sugar levels, lower cholesterol, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a valuable herb for managing diabetes and heart disease. The herbal preparations of Phaseolus vulgaris var. aureolus include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams for various health applications.
